Registry Templates Obligations Matrix About

PubLedge Templates

Suggested prior-art templates for Joint Interpretation Agreements (JIAs) and Regulatory Mitigation Agreements (RMAs) under Utah Code Title 13 Chapter 72 Part 4. Not official OAIP output.

JIA templates

  • Utah JIA Template — Mental-Health Chatbot Advertising and Representations (§13-72a-202) — us-ut · draft
  • Utah JIA Template — Mental-Health Chatbot Data Protection (§13-72a-201) — us-ut · draft
  • Utah JIA Template — Mental-Health Chatbot First-Session Disclosure (§13-72a-203) — us-ut · draft

RMA templates

  • Utah RMA Template — AI Sandbox Mitigation, Mental-Health Chatbot Cohort — us-ut · draft
  • Utah RMA Template — GenAI Safe-Harbor Enrollment (§13-75-104) — us-ut · draft
